name: Protection
description: Reduces most sources of damage by 4% per level

name: Fire Protection
description: Reduces fire damage and burn duration by 8% per level

name: Feather Falling
description: Reduces fall damage by 12% per level

name: Blast Protection
description: Reduces explosion damage and knockback by 8% per level

name: Projectile Protection
description: Reduces projectile damage by 8% per level

name: Respiration
description: Extends breathing time underwater by 15s per level

name: Aqua Affinity
description: Increases mining rate underwater to normal speed

name: Thorns
description: Deals 1-4 damage to attackers; chance to activate = 15% per level

name: Depth Strider
description: Increases underwater movement speed by 1/3 per level

name: Frost Walker
description: Turns water into frosted ice when walked over

name: Curse of Binding
description: Item cannot be removed from armor slot except on death or broken

name: Sharpness
description: Adds 0.5-1.5 melee attack damage per level

name: Smite
description: Adds 2.5 extra damage per level against undead mobs

name: Bane of Arthropods
description: Adds 2.5 extra damage per level against arthropods and applies Slowness IV

name: Knockback
description: Increases melee knockback distance

name: Fire Aspect
description: Sets target on fire for 3s per level

name: Looting
description: Increases mob drop quantity and rare drop chance per level

name: Sweeping Edge
description: Increases sweep attack damage to 50%/67%/75% of normal damage

name: Efficiency
description: Increases mining speed; works only with appropriate tool

name: Silk Touch
description: Mined blocks drop themselves instead of normal drops

name: Unbreaking
description: Gives a chance to avoid durability damage; chance = 100/(level+1)%

name: Fortune
description: Increases certain block drops; higher level = better multiplier

name: Power
description: Increases arrow damage by 25%*(level+1)

name: Punch
description: Increases arrow knockback by 3 blocks per level

name: Flame
description: Arrows set target on fire for 5 seconds

name: Infinity
description: Shooting consumes no regular arrows (must have at least 1 in inventory)

name: Luck of the Sea
description: Decreases junk catches and increases treasure catches per level

name: Lure
description: Decreases time before fish bite by 5s per level

name: Loyalty
description: Trident returns to player after being thrown; speed increases per level

name: Impaling
description: Adds 2.5 extra damage per level to aquatic mobs

name: Riptide
description: Propels player when thrown in rain or water

name: Channeling
description: Summons lightning bolt when trident hits mob during thunderstorm

name: Multishot
description: Shoots 3 arrows for the cost of 1

name: Quick Charge
description: Reduces crossbow charging time by 0.25s per level

name: Piercing
description: Arrows pass through (level+1) entities

name: Mending
description: Repairs item using XP orbs; 2 XP restores 1 durability

name: Curse of Vanishing
description: Item disappears on death instead of dropping

name: Soul Speed
description: Increases speed on soul sand and soul soil; damages boots per step

name: Swift Sneak
description: Increases sneaking movement speed by 15% per level

name: Wind Burst
description: Emits a wind burst on hitting a mob when falling

name: Density
description: Increases damage from smash attack by 0.5 per level per fallen block

name: Breach
description: Reduces armor effectiveness of the target by 15% per level
